mnemonics.title: Cloud Market Leaders
mnemonics.content: AMG (AWS, Microsoft, Google) - Like car brands but for clouds

acronyms.usage: Used when discussing Google's cloud services ecosystem

visualTips.visualization: Imagine AWS globe with 30+ pizza slices (regions), each containing multiple cheese cubes (AZs)

analogies.analogy: Like turning water faucet - pay only for what you use (utility model)
